response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with roughly 20 years of broad technical experience and some recent hands-on AI-adjacent work (MCP frameworks, agentic workflows), but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level AI Strategy role. The position requires demonstrated strategic AI platform leadership, recognized AI expertise, and a track record of advising external customers and partners at scale — none of which are substantiated. His AI involvement is recent and implementation-focused rather than strategic, he holds no advanced degree in AI or a related field, and his career titles reflect senior/staff IC contributor rather than the organizational influence and advisory seniority the role demands.
strengths: ~20 years of engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks, showing emerging builder fluency in AI tooling
Entrepreneurial track record via GISCollective and multiple open-source projects demonstrates product ownership and self-directed initiative
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI or a related technical field; holds a BS in Computer Science and a fine arts Bachelor's
Career titles cap out at Senior/Staff Software Engineer — no evidence of director-level IC scope, external advisory work, or organizational-scale technical influence
AI involvement is shallow in tenure and strategic depth: a single role entry with no shipped AI products, published research, or recognized domain expertise to substantiate the 'AI Strategy' mandate
